title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Assistant Manager, Assistant General Manager
shortInfo: APEDA Recruitment 2026 offers 08 vacancies for ssistant Manager & Assistant General Manager posts. Eligible candidates with Graduate, Post Graduate, MBA can apply online from 23-05-2026 to 22-06-2026 through the official APEDA website, apeda.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: APEDA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant General Manager (Finance) / Assistant Manager (Agriculture) Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority
basic_details.short_information: APEDA Recruitment 2026 offers 08 vacancies for ssistant Manager & Assistant General Manager posts. Eligible candidates with Graduate, Post Graduate, MBA can apply online from 23-05-2026 to 22-06-2026 through the official APEDA website, apeda.gov.in.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: PwD: 10 years Ex-Servicemen (ESM): 3 years after deduction of military service Defence Personnel disabled in operation during hostilities with any foreign country or in a disturbed area and released as a consequence thereof: 3 years Employees working in APEDA holding posts on regular basis with at least three years continuous service: 5 years

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the APEDA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Finance/Financial Management/MBA(Finance) OR Chartered Accountancy; Bachelor Degree in Agriculture/Horticulture/Plantation/Agriculture Engineering/Agriculture and Cooperation/Veterinary Science/Dairy Science/Dairy Technology/Food Processing/Food Processing Technology/Food Technology/Food Science/Food Science and Technology
qualification.details: Assistant General Manager (Finance): Post Graduate Degree in Finance/Financial Management/MBA(Finance) from a recognized University/Institution OR Chartered Accountancy from ICAI with 5 years of experience in the relevant fields post acquiring the educational qualification. Assistant Manager (Agriculture): Bachelor Degree in Agriculture/Horticulture/Plantation/Agriculture Engineering/Agriculture and Cooperation/Veterinary Science/Dairy Science/Dairy Technology/Food Processing/Food Processing Technology/Food Technology/Food Science/Food Science and Technology from a recognized University/Institution.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APEDA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for APEDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for APEDA Recruitment 2026 is 22nd June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in APEDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the posts of Assistant General Manager (Finance) and Assistant Manager (Agriculture) in the APEDA Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for Assistant General Manager (Finance)?
faq.answer: For Assistant General Manager (Finance), candidates need a Post Graduate Degree in Finance/Financial Management/MBA(Finance) or Chartered Accountancy from ICAI with 5 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the APEDA posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: What is the application fee for APEDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee varies for different categories. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 500/- for AGM (Finance) and Rs. 300/- for AM (Agriculture). SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the fee.

faq.question: What is the selection process for APEDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 35400 - Rs. 177500 Per Month.

faq.question: Can candidates from any state apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from any state can apply for this recruitment, provided they meet the eligibility criteria. The job location is New Delhi.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification for APEDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article or from the official APEDA website.

faq.question: How can I apply for the APEDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of APEDA or via the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.
